Mars Weather Station

6 Years of Martian Climate Data

Explore temperature, pressure, and atmospheric conditions from NASA's Mars missions (2012-2018). Navigate through Martian seasons and discover the Red Planet's weather patterns.

Min Temp
Max Temp
Avg Temp
Pressure

Current Selection

Date Range: Full Dataset
Data Points: ~1,894
Temperature Range: -78°C to -10°C

Mars Facts

Sol = Martian Day (~24h 37m)
Year ≈ 687 Earth days
Distance: 225M km from Sun

Data Source

NASA Mars Missions
InSight & Curiosity
2012-2018 Weather Data
← Mosquitoes Back to Octopus Observations

Background

Resilience Continuum is a project by Claire Nyquist which explores science through data visualization. I'm excited about the combination of the apparently disparate fields of design and public health as they come together in data visualization.

Contact

For inquiries or collaboration opportunities:
